checkAuth.description: Navigate to account overview — this page redirects to login when the session has expired.
Verify we landed on account-overview and were not redirected to the login page.

startAuth.description: Open account overview. If not logged in, blau.de redirects to the ForgeRock XUI login page.
Wait up to 3 minutes for the user to complete login and be redirected back to account overview.

getDocuments.description: Navigate to the Rechnungen page to establish an authenticated session context.
Fetch the billing account number and MSISDN from the customer master data API.

forEach.description: Fetch the invoice PDF as base64 via the PRINTSHOP download endpoint.
Save the base64-encoded PDF as an invoice document.

getDocuments.description: Fetch all monthly invoices from the invoiceContent API and download each PDF.
